---
title: "Publications"
toc: true
---

## Conference Papers

- Md. Olid Hasan Bhuiyan, **Souvik Das**, Shafayat Hossain Majumder, Suryadipta Majumdar, and Md. Shohrab Hossain.  
  *On Detecting Malicious Code Injection by Monitoring Multi-Level Container Activities.*  
  In **The 14th International Conference on Cloud Computing and Services Science (CLOSER)**, Angers, France, May 2–4, 2024.  
  [Paper](https://www.scitepress.org/Papers/2024/125094/125094.pdf) · [DOI](https://www.scitepress.org/Link.aspx?doi=10.5220/0012509400003711)

## Other Publications

- MD. Sabbir Hosen Pulok, Anusree Sen, **Souvik Das**, Farea Farhana Nishita, and MD. Mushfiquzzaman.  
  *Modeling Sustainable Challenges to Waste Reduction in the Food Industry.*  
  **Supply Chain Insider**, 7(1), 2022.
  
  [Paper](https://supplychaininsider.org/ojs/index.php/home/article/view/9)
